title: SpamMute
body:
**SpamMute: Intelligent Chat Protection**

SpamMute is a powerful, lightweight plugin that adds essential chat protection to your Minecraft server. It automatically detects and mutes players who spam similar messages, keeping your server chat clean and enjoyable for everyone.

**Key Features**

Smart Detection System: Uses advanced similarity algorithms to recognize spam patterns even when players make small variations to bypass traditional filters

Configurable Thresholds: Fine-tune detection sensitivity based on your server's needs

Automatic Mute Management: Temporarily mutes spammers and automatically unmutes them after the configured duration

Staff Notifications: Alerts staff members when players are muted for spam

Permission-Based Exemptions: Exclude trusted players or staff from spam detection

Manual Controls: Easily mute or unmute players with simple commands

Performance Optimized: Designed for efficiency with minimal impact on server performance

**Why Choose SpamMute?**

Many servers struggle with chat spam that disrupts conversations and degrades the player experience. Traditional solutions often rely on simple cooldown systems that are easy to bypass or complex setups requiring multiple plugins.

SpamMute offers the perfect balance of effectiveness and simplicity. The plugin uses intelligent similarity detection to catch spam variations while preventing false positives. Whether you're running a small community server or a large network, SpamMute provides the tools you need to maintain chat quality without constant staff intervention.

**Getting Started**

Installation is simple - just drop the plugin into your plugins folder and restart your server.

The default configuration works well for most servers, but you can easily customize all aspects of the plugin through the config.yml file.

**Commands**

/spammute reload - Reload the plugin configuration

/spammute mute <player> [duration] - Manually mute a player

/spammute unmute <player> - Manually unmute a player

**Permissions**

spammute.command - Access to the base command

spammute.reload - Permission to reload the configuration

spammute.mute - Permission to manually mute players

spammute.unmute - Permission to manually unmute players

spammute.notify - Receive notifications when players are muted

spammute.exempt - Exempt from spam detection

Enhance your server's chat experience today with SpamMute - the intelligent solution for chat protection!
